title: CountryRegistry
description: One document per country stored in MongoDB's `countries` collection. The backend upserts this automatically when it receives a worker message. The frontend reads it to discover available countries and their indicators — no hardcoding.

country_name.description: Display name in English, e.g. Brazil

region_type.description: Administrative division type for this country, e.g. state

available_indicators.description: List of indicator keys available for at least one region. Derived from all RegionData documents for this country.

workers.description: Names of data source workers that have provided data, e.g. [ibge, datasus, aneel]

last_scraped.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the most recent successful scrape
